title: Vasantha Sena Song Lyrics Shree
stanzas:
Vasantha saena vasantha saena
vasiyam seiyya piranthavailthaana
nee illaadhu naan ena naanaa
senaa vasantha senaa..(2)

Madha sena manmadha senaa
enakkul edhaiyo
thirudi chendraana
kadhal oorukku
vazhi idhuthaanaa senaa!!(2)
madhana senaa..

Vasantha saena vasantha saena
vasiyam seiyya piranthavailthaana
nee illaadhu naan ena naanaa
senaa vasantha senaa..

Anuvai anu anu anuvaai
en azhagai thulaithavane
anu sakthiyaai irundhu
en uyirai valarthavane

en imaigal irandinai
vidumuraik anuppi
iravinil thookkam keduthavane

Madha sena manmadha senaa
enakkul edhaiyo
thirudi chendraana
kadhal oorukku
vazhi idhuthaanaa senaa!
madhana senaa..

Uyiril uyir pudhaithu
pudhayal eduthavale
uruvam ini edharku
en vetkam koduthavale

poiyaathoru mozhiyil
en meiyyai valaithavane
koiyaathoru kaniyai
kannaal koithavane

Vasantha saena vasantha saena
vasiyam seiyya piranthavailthaana
nee illaadhu naan ena naanaa
senaa vasantha senaa..

Madha sena manmadha senaa
enakkul edhaiyo
thirudi chendraana
kadhal oorukku
vazhi idhuthaanaa senaa!!
madhana senaa..

Vasantha saena vasantha saena
vasiyam seiyya piranthavailthaana
nee illaadhu naan ena naanaa
senaa vasantha senaa..

seo.title: Vasantha Sena Song Lyrics Shree
seo.description: Full Vasantha Sena Song songs lyrics, Shree Songs Lyrics. sharable lyrics snippets, Singer(s): Harish Ragavendra, K.S.Chitra.
seo.keywords: Shree, Harish Ragavendra, K.S.Chitra, Vasantha Sena Song full lyrics, Shree songs lyrics, Vasantha Sena Song lyrics snippets, Vasantha Sena Song WhatsApp status lyrics snippets, share Vasantha Sena Song lyrics snippets with friends, Tamil lyrics, Tamil songs

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

Vasantha Sena expresses themes of love and affection, highlighting the beauty of romantic relationships.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Shree, the song plays during a pivotal romantic moment, enhancing the emotional connection between the characters.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the melodious voices of Harish Ragavendra and K.S.Chitra.

When was the song released?

Vasantha Sena was released on July 19, 2002.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Vasantha Sena from the movie Shree beautifully encapsulates the feelings of love and romance. It showcases the chemistry between the lead characters, making it a memorable part of the film. The soothing melody, combined with the heartfelt lyrics, evokes a sense of joy and warmth. This duet is perfect for celebrating love during special occasions.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Vasantha Sena from Shree is a delightful romantic duet that captures the essence of love and longing. With the enchanting voices of Harish Ragavendra and K.S.Chitra, this song weaves a beautiful tapestry of emotions that resonates with listeners. Experience the magic of this collaboration that brings forth a soothing melody perfect for any romantic occasion.
stanzaMeanings: In the spring season, you are the one who brings joy; without you, what am I? Oh spring season!
Oh love, you are the one who has stolen something from me; does love show the way to the town?
In the spring season, you are the one who brings joy; without you, what am I? Oh spring season!
You are the one who has taken my beauty and raised my life with your strength.
With the chains of love, I have been captured; I have written about the rule of love and asked for it.
My feelings are sent to you, and you have taken away my sleep.
You have taken my heart and made it heavy, like a golden elephant.
Love has shown the way, my friend, love, my friend.
Oh love, you are the one who has stolen something from me; does love show the way to the town?
You have given life to my life, taking away my form; what is my shame now?
In a false language, you have captured my truth; with a beautiful fruit, you have taken away my sight.
In the morning, I will gather my thoughts and bring them together, like a clever dog.
You have opened your heart and fallen like a drop of dew; now, you will live sweetly.
Oh love, you are the one who has shown the way, my friend, love, my friend.
In the spring season, you are the one who brings joy; without you, what am I? Oh spring season!
Oh love, you are the one who has stolen something from me; does love show the way to the town?
In the spring season, you are the one who brings joy; without you, what am I? Oh spring season!
